reviews.comment:
Soy socio del ACA más de 20 años cargo combustible allí en Avellaneda hace años ahora por una circunstancia especial de índole laboral,debo cargar de noche.El playero nocturno siempre evita cargarme por que dice que la Estacion  acepta solo debito Visa no Maestro. (No manejo efvo solo debito.)Hoy cargué de día temprano y los playeros me dijeron que no tienen ningún problema con las tarjetas de Debito. Consulta? Quien controla el manejo del playero nocturno allí? Una pena tener que andar usando otras estaciones teniendo esta en mi zona y de camino al trabajo.

(Translated by Google)
I've been an ACA member for over 20 years. I've been filling up there in Avellaneda for years. Due to a special work-related circumstance, I have to fill up at night. The nighttime gas station attendant always avoids filling up because he says the station only accepts Visa debit, not Maestro. (I don't handle cash, only debit.) Today I filled up early in the morning, and the gas station attendants told me they have no problem with debit cards. Question? Who controls the operation of the nighttime gas station there? It's a shame I have to use other stations, considering this one is in my area and on my way to work.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15003011604838907149/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURpOEtTelJnEAE

reviews.comment:
Ir tarde ocasiona malestar aparentemente y quise pagar con la app y me dijo que no funciona y nunca la activo para pagar con qr,pésima atención

(Translated by Google)
Being late apparently causes discomfort, and when I tried to pay with the app, it said it didn't work and I never activated it to pay with QR codes. Terrible service.
